title: Vibe Title En Cryogenic Elegance Master
sourceTitle: Vibe Title En Cryogenic Elegance Master Prompt
prompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Cryogenic Elegance",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic, avant-garde editorial photograph of The Protagonist in an abandoned sub-zero cryogenic botanical archive. The Protagonist has a direct, piercing gaze, featuring natural skin textures, visible pores, micro-condensation, and physical frost organically clinging to their eyelashes. They wear a high-budget practical effect wardrobe consisting of hand-blown clear glass and raw quartz that mimics an intricate, heavy frost crown and crystalline armor, with real powdery snow resting on its ridges. In the lower foreground, their hands—clad in sheer, frost-bitten woven gloves—delicately hold a thick block of perfectly clear, refracting ice encasing a bioluminescent, glowing pale-blue botanical specimen. The environment behind them is a deep, blurred background of frosted glass vats and dark, frozen pine structures. Shot on a Hasselblad H6D-100c with an HC 100mm f/2.2 lens for a shallow depth of field. Lighting features soft overcast winter diffusion with a subtle, cold cyan rim light separating the subject from the background. The glowing botanical specimen casts a soft, practical blue bounce light onto the subject's face and hands. Exceptional sharpness on the irises and the sharp edges of the ice, Kodak Portra 160 film stock characteristics pushed for cooler tones, organic film grain, volumetric freezing breath haze in the air. Absolute photorealism, no CGI magic, no neon.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "To create a high-fashion, surreal winter portrait combining organic human texture with intricate, physically accurate ice and glass practical effects.",
    "priorities": "Hyper-realistic textures, cinematic cold lighting, direct piercing gaze, practical-effect surrealism over digital magic.",
    "device_profile": "High-Resolution Medium Format Digital Camera"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "9:16",
    "composition": "Medium close-up, subject centered with hands entering the lower foreground to frame a held object.",
    "layout": "Vertical portrait emphasizing the crown structure and the held object in the lower third.",
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level, intimate and confrontational.",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Female",
    "identity": "The Protagonist",
    "demographics": "Ageless, ethereal yet grounded in physical realism",
    "face": "Symmetrical, pale complexion with visible pores, micro-condensation, and frost on eyelashes",
    "hair": "Tucked away or blending into the frosty headpiece",
    "body": "Strong posture, shoulders draped in heavy crystalline structures",
    "expression": "Intense, calm, piercing, holding a silent, chilling authority",
    "pose": "Facing forward directly at the lens, hands gently cupping an object in front of the chest"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Crystalline armor bodice",
        "material": "Hand-blown clear glass, raw quartz, translucent resin",
        "color": "Icy transparent blue and stark white",
        "fit": "Structured, rigid, heavily textured"
      },
      {
        "item": "Sheer winter gloves",
        "material": "Woven frost-bitten silk and lace",
        "color": "Pale frost white",
        "fit": "Skin-tight"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Intricate frost crown",
        "color": "Clear, refracting icy blue and silver",
        "material": "Raw quartz, glass, physical snow powder",
        "brand_style": "Avant-garde practical effects prop"
      },
      {
        "item": "Ice-encased glowing botanical specimen",
        "color": "Bioluminescent pale cyan",
        "material": "Thick refracting ice, organic glowing flower",
        "brand_style": "Surreal natural prop"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "An abandoned sub-zero cryogenic botanical archive",
    "surfaces": "Frosted glass vats, dark frozen wood, cold metallic grating",
    "depth": "Deep, blurred background with heavy bokeh",
    "atmosphere": "Freezing cold, hazy with frozen breath and ozone",
    "lens_interaction": "Soft optical blooming around the practical bioluminescent glow"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Soft overcast winter daylight from above",
    "fill": "Practical soft blue bounce light from the held glowing specimen",
    "rim": "Crisp, cold cyan rim light from behind to separate the subject",
    "shadows": "Deep, cool-toned and soft-edged",
    "color_temperature": "Very cool, ~4000K",
    "sensor_flare": "None, clean optical rendering"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Medium telephoto prime",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.2",
    "focus": "Tack sharp on the irises and the front edge of the ice block",
    "sensor_format": "Medium Format 100MP",
    "perspective_distortion": "None, beautifully compressed facial features"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Cool winter palette emphasizing frosty blues, crisp whites, and deep greens",
    "tonality": "High dynamic range with deep blacks and luminous, retained highlights",
    "texture": "Kodak Portra 160 grain, ultra-detailed micro-contrast on the skin and ice",
    "digital_sharpening": "None, organic lens sharpness only",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Minimal, high-end optical correction"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "neon",
    "digital painting",
    "3D render",
    "cartoon",
    "illustration",
    "flat lighting",
    "plastic skin",
    "CGI magic effects",
    "sparkles",
    "warm lighting"
  ]
}
originalPrompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Cryogenic Elegance",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic, avant-garde editorial photograph of The Protagonist in an abandoned sub-zero cryogenic botanical archive. The Protagonist has a direct, piercing gaze, featuring natural skin textures, visible pores, micro-condensation, and physical frost organically clinging to their eyelashes. They wear a high-budget practical effect wardrobe consisting of hand-blown clear glass and raw quartz that mimics an intricate, heavy frost crown and crystalline armor, with real powdery snow resting on its ridges. In the lower foreground, their hands—clad in sheer, frost-bitten woven gloves—delicately hold a thick block of perfectly clear, refracting ice encasing a bioluminescent, glowing pale-blue botanical specimen. The environment behind them is a deep, blurred background of frosted glass vats and dark, frozen pine structures. Shot on a Hasselblad H6D-100c with an HC 100mm f/2.2 lens for a shallow depth of field. Lighting features soft overcast winter diffusion with a subtle, cold cyan rim light separating the subject from the background. The glowing botanical specimen casts a soft, practical blue bounce light onto the subject's face and hands. Exceptional sharpness on the irises and the sharp edges of the ice, Kodak Portra 160 film stock characteristics pushed for cooler tones, organic film grain, volumetric freezing breath haze in the air. Absolute photorealism, no CGI magic, no neon.",

promptTranslations.zh:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Cryogenic Elegance",
  "master_prompt": "一张超逼真前卫的时尚编辑照片，主角置身于废弃的零下低温植物冷冻库。主角凝视目光锐利，展现自然皮肤纹理、可见毛孔、微小凝结水珠，以及有机附着的睫毛霜冻。服装为高预算实景特效，手工吹制透明玻璃与天然石英组成，仿若复杂厚重的霜冻王冠及晶体盔甲，实粉雪覆盖其棱角。前景下方，主角戴着薄透冰霜编织手套，轻托一块晶莹剔透、折射光线的厚冰块，内封装一株发光的蓝白色生物荧光植物标本。背景为朦胧的霜冻玻璃容器及昏暗冷冻松木结构。采用哈苏H6D-100c搭配100mm f/2.2镜头拍摄，浅景深。光线柔和漫射，带微冷青色轮廓光使主体与背景分离。荧光植物喷洒柔蓝色补光至面部和手部。虹膜及冰块边缘锐利，模拟柯达Portra 160胶片特性，推冷色调，带有有机颗粒、体积感冷气呼吸雾气。绝对逼真，不使用CGI，无霓虹。",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "打造结合有机人肤质与精准物理冰玻璃特效的高端冬季超现实人像。",
    "priorities": "超逼真质地，电影级冷色照明，深邃凝视，实景特效胜过数字魔法。",
    "device_profile": "高分辨率中画幅数码相机"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "9:16",
    "composition": "中近景，主体居中，双手前景托物。",
    "layout": "竖幅肖像，强调王冠结构与画面下三分之一托物。",
    "camera_angle": "平视，亲密且对视感强烈。",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "女性",
    "identity": "主角",
    "demographics": "无年龄，空灵且具物理真实性",
    "face": "对称，苍白肤色，毛孔、微凝露和睫毛霜冻清晰可见",
    "hair": "藏于冰霜头饰中或与之融合",
    "body": "挺拔体态，肩部披覆厚重晶体结构",
    "expression": "凝重、冷静、锐利，散发无声冰冷威严",
    "pose": "正面直视镜头，双手轻托胸前物体"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "晶体盔甲短胸衣",
        "material": "手工吹制透明玻璃，天然石英，半透明树脂",
        "color": "冰蓝透明与纯白",
        "fit": "结构性强，硬挺，质感丰富"
      },
      {
        "item": "薄纱冬季手套",
        "material": "冰冻丝绸及蕾丝编织",
        "color": "淡霜白",
        "fit": "贴肤紧身"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "复杂冰霜王冠",
        "color": "透明，折射冰蓝与银色",
        "material": "天然石英，玻璃，真实粉雪",
        "brand_style": "前卫实景特效道具"
      },
      {
        "item": "冰块封存发光植物标本",
        "color": "生物发光淡青色",
        "material": "厚重折射冰，天然发光花卉",
        "brand_style": "超现实自然道具"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "废弃的零下低温植物冷冻库",
    "surfaces": "霜冻玻璃大缸，深色冰冻木，冷金属格栅",
    "depth": "深邃背景虚化重散景",
    "atmosphere": "冰冷，带有冷气呼吸雾与臭氧感",
    "lens_interaction": "实景发光体光晕柔化"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "上方柔和阴天冬日自然光",
    "fill": "被发光植物衬托的柔蓝色补光",
    "rim": "来自后方的清晰冷青边缘光分离主体",
    "shadows": "深邃冷调，柔边",
    "color_temperature": "极冷，约4000K",
    "sensor_flare": "无，光学渲染干净"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "中长焦定焦",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.2",
    "focus": "虹膜及冰块前缘极致锐利",
    "sensor_format": "中画幅100MP",
    "perspective_distortion": "无，面部特征压缩美观"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "冰蓝、洁白、深绿为主冷冬调调色",
    "tonality": "高动态范围，保留高光与深黑",
    "texture": "柯达Portra 160颗粒感，皮肤及冰块微对比超细节",
    "digital_sharpening": "无，纯镜头清晰度",
    "chromatic_aberration": "极低，高端光学校正"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "霓虹",
    "数字绘画",
    "3D渲染",
    "卡通",
    "插画",
    "平面光",
    "塑料感皮肤",
    "CGI魔法效果",
    "闪烁",
    "暖色光"
  ]
}
promptTranslations.fr:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Cryogenic Elegance",
  "master_prompt": "Une photographie éditoriale hyperréaliste et avant-gardiste du Protagoniste dans un ancien archive cryogénique botanique subzero abandonné. Le Protagoniste a un regard direct et perçant, mettant en valeur des textures de peau naturelles, pores visibles, micro-condensation, et du givre physique accroché organiquement à ses cils. Il porte une garde-robe d’effets pratiques haut de gamme composée de verre clair soufflé à la main et de quartz brut imitant une couronne de givre lourde et complexe ainsi qu’une armure cristalline, avec de la vraie neige poudreuse reposant sur ses crêtes. Au premier plan inférieur, ses mains — gantées de gants tissés translucides givrés — tiennent délicatement un bloc épais de glace parfaitement claire et réfringente enfermant un spécimen botanique bioluminescent bleu pâle lumineux. L’environnement derrière est un arrière-plan profond flou composé de cuves en verre givré et de structures sombres de pins gelés. Photo prise avec un Hasselblad H6D-100c équipé d’un objectif HC 100mm f/2.2 pour une faible profondeur de champ. L’éclairage utilise une douce diffusion hivernale couverte avec un subtil contre-jour cyan froid séparant le sujet de l’arrière-plan. Le spécimen botanique lumineux projette une lumière de rebond bleue diffuse et pratique sur le visage et les mains du sujet. Netteté exceptionnelle sur les iris et les bords tranchants de la glace, caractéristiques du film Kodak Portra 160 poussé vers des tons plus froids, grain organique du film, buée volumétrique de souffle gelé dans l’air. Photorealisme absolu, sans magie CGI, sans néon.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Créer un portrait hivernal high fashion et surréaliste mêlant texture humaine organique à des effets pratiques complexes de glace et verre physiquement précis.",
    "priorities": "Textures hyperréalistes, éclairage froid cinématographique, regard direct perçant, surréalisme par effets pratiques plutôt que magie digitale.",
    "device_profile": "Appareil photo numérique moyen format haute résolution"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "9:16",
    "composition": "Plan rapproché moyen, sujet centré avec mains entrant au premier plan inférieur pour encadrer un objet tenu.",
    "layout": "Portrait vertical mettant en valeur la structure de la couronne et l’objet tenu dans le tiers inférieur.",
    "camera_angle": "À hauteur des yeux, intime et confrontant.",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Femme",
    "identity": "Le Protagoniste",
    "demographics": "Intemporelle, éthérée mais ancrée dans un réalisme physique",
    "face": "Symétrique, teint pâle avec pores visibles, micro-condensation, et givre sur les cils",
    "hair": "Retirée ou fusionnant avec le diadème givré",
    "body": "Posture forte, épaules drapées dans des structures cristallines lourdes",
    "expression": "Intense, calme, perçant, détenant une autorité silencieuse et glaciale",
    "pose": "Face à l’objectif, mains délicatement tenant un objet devant la poitrine"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Corsage d’armure cristalline",
        "material": "Verre clair soufflé à la main, quartz brut, résine translucide",
        "color": "Bleu transparent glacé et blanc éclatant",
        "fit": "Structuré, rigide, fortement texturé"
      },
      {
        "item": "Gants hivernaux transparents",
        "material": "Soie tissée givrée et dentelle",
        "color": "Blanc givré pâle",
        "fit": "Très ajusté"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Couronne de givre complexe",
        "color": "Transparente, réfringente bleu glacé et argent",
        "material": "Quartz brut, verre, poudre de neige physique",
        "brand_style": "Accessoire avant-garde d’effets pratiques"
      },
      {
        "item": "Spécimen botanique lumineux enfermé dans la glace",
        "color": "Cyan bioluminescent pâle",
        "material": "Glace épaisse réfringente, fleur organique lumineuse",
        "brand_style": "Accessoire naturel surréaliste"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Archive botanique cryogénique subzero abandonnée",
    "surfaces": "Cuves en verre givré, bois gelé sombre, grille métallique froide",
    "depth": "Arrière-plan profond flou avec fort bokeh",
    "atmosphere": "Froid glacial, brumeux avec souffle gelé et ozone",
    "lens_interaction": "Légère diffusion optique autour de la lueur bioluminescente pratique"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Lumière douce et diffuse d’un jour d’hiver couvert,",
    "fill": "Lumière de rebond douce bleue pratique émanant du spécimen lumineux",
    "rim": "Lumière de contour cyan froide nette venant de derrière pour séparer le sujet",
    "shadows": "Ombres profondes, ton froid, à bords doux",
    "color_temperature": "Très froid, environ 4000K",
    "sensor_flare": "Aucun, rendu optique propre"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Objectif téléobjectif moyen fixe",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.2",
    "focus": "Mise au point extrêmement nette sur les iris et le bord avant du bloc de glace",
    "sensor_format": "Moyen format 100MP",
    "perspective_distortion": "Aucune, traits du visage magnifiquement compressés"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Palette hivernale froide mettant en valeur bleus givrés, blancs nets et verts profonds",
    "tonality": "Grande plage dynamique avec noirs profonds et hautes lumières lumineuses conservées",
    "texture": "Grain Kodak Portra 160, micro-contraste ultra-détaillé sur peau et glace",
    "digital_sharpening": "Aucun, netteté organique de l’objectif seule",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Minimale, correction optique haut de gamme"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "néon",
    "peinture digitale",
    "rendu 3D",
    "dessin animé",
    "illustration",
    "éclairage plat",
    "peau plastique",
    "effets magiques CGI",
    "paillettes",
    "éclairage chaud"
  ]
}
promptTranslations.ru:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Cryogenic Elegance",
  "master_prompt": "Гиперреалистичная авангардная редакционная фотография Главного героя в заброшенном субнульовом криогенном ботаническом архиве. Главный герой смотрит прямо и пронзительно, с естественной текстурой кожи, видимыми порами, микроконденсатом и физическим инеем, органично прилипшим к ресницам. Он одет в высокобюджетный костюм с практическими эффектами из выдувного прозрачного стекла и необработанного кварца, имитирующий сложную тяжелую корону из инея и кристаллическую броню, с настоящим порошковым снегом на гребнях. В нижнем плане переднего плана его руки в прозрачных, обледенелых вязаных перчатках нежно держат толстый блок идеально прозрачного преломляющего ледяного куска, внутри которого заключен биолюминесцентный светящийся бледно-голубой ботанический образец. Фон — глубокий, размытый, с замороженными стеклянными емкостями и темными замороженными сосновыми структурами. Снято на Hasselblad H6D-100c с объективом HC 100mm f/2.2 для мелкой глубины резкости. Освещение — мягкое затянутое зимнее дневное, с тонким холодным циановым контровым светом, отделяющим объект от фона. Светящийся ботанический образец отбрасывает мягкий практический синий отраженный свет на лицо и руки модели. Исключительная резкость на радужках и острых краях льда, характеристики пленки Kodak Portra 160 сдвинуты в холодные тона, органическая зернистость пленки, объемный морозный пар дыхания в воздухе. Абсолютный фотореализм, без CGI и неоновых эффектов.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Создать высокомодный сюрреалистичный зимний портрет, сочетающий органическую человеческую текстуру с детализированными физически точными ледяными и стеклянными практическими эффектами.",
    "priorities": "Гиперреалистичные текстуры, кинематографичное холодное освещение, прямой пронзительный взгляд, практический сюрреализм вместо цифровой магии.",
    "device_profile": "Цифровая камера среднего формата высокого разрешения"
  },
  "frame": {

    "composition": "Средний крупный план, объект в центре, руки входят в нижний план, обрамляя удерживаемый предмет.",

promptTranslations.pt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Elegância Criogênica",
  "master_prompt": "Uma fotografia editorial hiper-realista e vanguardista do Protagonista em um arquivo botânico criogênico abandonado abaixo de zero. O Protagonista tem um olhar direto e penetrante, apresentando texturas naturais da pele, poros visíveis, micro-condensação e geada física aderida organicamente aos cílios. Ele veste um guarda-roupa de efeitos práticos de alto orçamento composto por vidro transparente soprado à mão e quartzo bruto que imita uma intricada coroa de geada pesada e armadura cristalina, com neve em pó real repousando em suas cristas. Em primeiro plano inferior, suas mãos — vestidas com luvas transparentes tecidas e congeladas — seguram delicadamente um bloco grosso de gelo perfeitamente claro e refrativo que envolve uma amostra botânica bioluminescente, azul-pálida e brilhante. O ambiente atrás dele é um fundo profundo e desfocado de tanques de vidro congelados e estruturas escuras de pinho congelado. Capturado com uma Hasselblad H6D-100c com lente HC 100mm f/2.2 para profundidade de campo rasa. A iluminação apresenta difusão suave de luz de inverno nublado com uma sutil luz de contorno ciano fria separando o sujeito do fundo. A amostra botânica brilhante projeta uma luz azul prática suave no rosto e nas mãos do sujeito. Nitidez excepcional nas íris e nas bordas afiadas do gelo, características do filme Kodak Portra 160 com tons mais frios, grão orgânico de filme, névoa volumétrica do hálito congelado no ar. Fotorrealismo absoluto, sem magia CGI, sem neon.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Criar um retrato de inverno de alta moda e surreal combinando textura humana orgânica com efeitos práticos intricados e fisicamente precisos de gelo e vidro.",
    "priorities": "Texturas hiper-realistas, iluminação fria cinematográfica, olhar direto e penetrante, surrealismo de efeitos práticos em vez de magia digital.",
    "device_profile": "Câmera digital de médio formato de alta resolução"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "9:16",
    "composition": "Plano médio próximo, sujeito centralizado com mãos entrando em primeiro plano inferior para enquadrar um objeto segurado.",
    "layout": "Retrato vertical enfatizando a estrutura da coroa e o objeto segurado no terço inferior.",
    "camera_angle": "Nível dos olhos, íntimo e confrontador.",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Feminino",
    "identity": "O Protagonista",
    "demographics": "Sem idade, etérea mas fundamentada no realismo físico",
    "face": "Simétrico, pele pálida com poros visíveis, micro-condensação e geada nos cílios",
    "hair": "Preso ou misturado à peça de cabeça congelada",
    "body": "Postura forte, ombros cobertos por estruturas cristalinas pesadas",
    "expression": "Intensa, calma, penetrante, com autoridade silenciosa e gelada",
    "pose": "De frente diretamente para a lente, mãos segurando delicadamente um objeto à frente do peito"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Corpete de armadura cristalina",
        "material": "Vidro transparente soprado à mão, quartzo bruto, resina translúcida",
        "color": "Azul transparente gelado e branco intenso",
        "fit": "Estruturado, rígido, altamente texturizado"
      },
      {
        "item": "Luvas de inverno transparentes",
        "material": "Seda e renda tecidas congeladas",
        "color": "Branco pálido de geada",
        "fit": "Justas ao corpo"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Intrincada coroa de geada",
        "color": "Transparente, refratando azul gelado e prata",
        "material": "Quartzo bruto, vidro, pó de neve física",
        "brand_style": "Adereço de efeitos práticos vanguardista"
      },
      {
        "item": "Amostra botânica brilhante encapsulada em gelo",
        "color": "Ciano pálido bioluminescente",
        "material": "Gelo grosso refrativo, flor orgânica luminosa",
        "brand_style": "Adereço natural surreal"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Arquivo botânico criogênico abandonado abaixo de zero",
    "surfaces": "Tanques de vidro congelados, madeira escura congelada, grade metálica fria",
    "depth": "Fundo profundo e desfocado com bokeh pesado",
    "atmosphere": "Frio congelante, nebuloso com hálito congelado e ozônio",
    "lens_interaction": "Blooming óptico suave ao redor do brilho bioluminescente prático"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Luz suave de dia nublado de inverno vinda de cima",
    "fill": "Luz prática azul suave refletida da amostra brilhante segurada",
    "rim": "Luz de contorno ciano fria e nítida atrás para separar o sujeito",

promptTranslations.ja:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Cryogenic Elegance",
  "master_prompt": "放棄された氷点下のクリオジェニック植物アーカイブでの主人公の超リアルでアバンギャルドなエディトリアル写真。主人公は直接的で鋭い視線を持ち、自然な肌質感、目に見える毛穴、微細な結露、まつ毛に有機的に付着した物理的な霜を鮮明に見せる。彼女は手吹きのクリアガラスと未加工の水晶で作られた高予算の実用効果衣装を身にまとい、複雑で重厚な霜の王冠と結晶鎧を模倣し、その稜線には粉雪が物理的に乗っている。手前下部には、透ける霜被り織手袋を着けた手で、生物発光する薄青く輝く植物標本を包み込む完璧に透明な氷の厚いブロックを繊細に保持している。背後の環境は、氷結したガラス製のタンクと暗く凍った松の構造物が深くぼやけた背景を構成。Hasselblad H6D-100c、HC 100mm f/2.2レンズで浅い被写界深度撮影。照明は柔らかな曇り冬の日光拡散と被写体を背景から分離する冷たいシアン色の輪郭光。標本の青い発光が被写体の顔と手に柔らかい実用的な青色の反射光を投げかける。虹彩と氷の鋭いエッジに卓越したシャープさ。Kodak Portra 160フィルム特性を冷色調にプッシュ。オーガニックな粒状感、空気中の立体的な凍った息の霞。絶対的なフォトリアリズム、CGIなし、ネオンなし。",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "有機的な人間の質感と緻密で物理的に正確な氷とガラスの実用効果を組み合わせたハイファッションかつ超現実的な冬の肖像を創造すること。",
    "priorities": "超リアルな質感、映画的な寒色光、鋭いまなざし、デジタル魔法より実用効果超現実主義を優先。",
    "device_profile": "高解像度中判デジタルカメラ"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "9:16",
    "composition": "ミディアムクローズアップ、被写体中央、手は下部前景に入り保持物を構成。",
    "layout": "縦型ポートレートで王冠構造と下三分の一の持ち物を強調。",
    "camera_angle": "目線レベル、親密で対話的。",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "女性",
    "identity": "主人公",
    "demographics": "時を超えた、現実的な物理性を持つ幽玄さ",
    "face": "左右対称、毛穴や微結露が見える蒼白な肌、まつ毛は霜が付着",
    "hair": "凍った頭飾りに隠れるか溶け込む",
    "body": "強い姿勢、肩は重い結晶構造に覆われる",
    "expression": "鋭く冷静で重厚な威厳を放つ",
    "pose": "レンズを真っすぐ見つめ、胸前で物をそっと抱える手を構える"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "結晶鎧のボディス",
        "material": "手吹きガラス、未加工水晶、半透明樹脂",
        "color": "氷のような透明な青と純白",
        "fit": "構造的で硬い、ディテール豊富"
      },
      {
        "item": "透ける冬用手袋",
        "material": "霜を帯びた絹とレースの織物",
        "color": "淡い霜色の白",
        "fit": "肌に密着"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "複雑な霜の王冠",
        "color": "透明で屈折する氷青と銀色",
        "material": "未加工水晶、ガラス、物理的な雪粉",
        "brand_style": "アバンギャルドの実用効果小道具"
      },
      {
        "item": "氷で包まれた発光植物標本",
        "color": "生物発光する淡いシアン色",
        "material": "厚い屈折氷、有機的な光る花",
        "brand_style": "超現実的な自然オブジェ"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "放棄された氷点下のクリオジェニック植物アーカイブ",
    "surfaces": "霜の付いたガラス製タンク、暗い凍った木材、冷たい金属格子",
    "depth": "深いぼかし背景と多量のボケ",
    "atmosphere": "凍える寒さ、凍った息とオゾンの霞み",
    "lens_interaction": "実用的な生物発光の柔らかい光のにじみ"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "上方からの柔らかい曇り冬の自然光",
    "fill": "持ち物の発光標本からの穏やかな青色の反射光",
    "rim": "後方から被写体を分離する鮮明で冷たいシアン色の輪郭光",
    "shadows": "深く冷たい色調で柔らかい影",
    "color_temperature": "非常に冷たい、約4000K",
    "sensor_flare": "なし、クリーンな光学表現"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "中望遠単焦点レンズ",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.2",
    "focus": "虹彩と氷ブロックの前縁に精密なピント合わせ",
    "sensor_format": "中判100MP",
    "perspective_distortion": "なし、魅力的に圧縮された顔立ち"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "霜の青、清澄な白、深緑を強調する冷たい冬パレット",
    "tonality": "深い黒と輝きを保持したハイダイナミックレンジ",
    "texture": "Kodak Portra 160の粒状感と皮膚および氷の超詳細なマイクロコントラスト",
    "digital_sharpening": "なし、有機的なレンズシャープネスのみ",
    "chromatic_aberration": "最小限、高度な光学補正"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "ネオン",
    "デジタルペイント",
    "3Dレンダリング",
    "漫画",
    "イラスト",
    "平坦な照明",
    "プラスチック肌",
    "CGI魔法効果",
    "キラキラ",
    "暖色照明"
  ]
}
promptTranslations.ko:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Cryogenic Elegance",
  "master_prompt": "버려진 영하의 극저온 식물 아카이브에서 주인공을 초실감, 아방가르드 에디토리얼 사진으로 담은 작품. 주인공은 직접적이고 날카로운 시선을 지녔으며, 자연스러운 피부 질감, 보이는 모공, 미세 응축과 속눈썹에 자연스럽게 붙은 서리를 특징으로 한다. 고가의 실용 효과 의상을 입고 있는데, 손으로 불어 만든 투명 유리와 원석 쿼츠로 이뤄진 복잡하고 무거운 서리 왕관과 수정 갑옷을 모방하며, 이마에 실제 가루눈이 쌓여 있다. 전경 하단에 그녀의 손은 투명하고 서리 낀 짜임의 장갑을 착용한 상태로 아주 깨끗한 굴절되는 얼음 블록을 섬세하게 쥐고, 그 안에는 생물발광하는 옅은 파란색 식물 표본이 들어 있다. 배경은 흐릿하게 처리된 서리가 낀 유리 용기들과 어두운 얼어붙은 소나무 구조물로 깊고 무겁게 구성되어 있다. Hasselblad H6D-100c에 HC 100mm f/2.2 렌즈로 촬영해 얕은 피사계 심도를 제공하며, 부드러운 겨울 흐린 조명과 냉정한 시안색 림 라이트가 피사체를 배경에서 분리한다. 식물 표본의 푸른 발광이 얼굴과 손에 부드러운 실용광을 투사한다. 홍채와 얼음 모서리에 탁월한 선명도를 보이며, Kodak Portra 160 필름 특성으로 차가운 톤을 강조하고 유기적 필름 그레인이 느껴지며, 공기 중에 볼류메트릭 서리 호흡 안개가 존재한다. 절대적 사실성, CGI 나 네온 효과 전혀 없음.",
